		<geometry>259, 413, 490, 261</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>Run Spacecraft Mass Analysis config from the main toolbar.

See Simulation Variables tree docked on the  left.

Expand root Spacecraft node recursively to see all values.

Point mouse cursor over the value to read requirement text.

Change estimated mass of any component (e.g. Thruster me to 28) to satisfy requirement and see how value change propagates to the top and changes total estimated mass of the spacecraft.

Note that all values are recorded back to an instance model on termination.
</text>
	</mdElement>
</mdOwnedViews>
